en: Can you make me a black coffee please?
ko: 블랙 커피 타줄 수 있어? Beth한테 시킬게. 블랙 커피

en: I'll ask Beth to make it. Now can you make me a black coffee please?
I'll make myself a black coffee. Now can you make me a black coffee please?
I'll buy you a black coffee. Now can you make me a black coffee please?
I'll add some milk. Now can you make me a black coffee please?
I'll make you a black tea. No, can you make me a black coffee please?
Can you make me a black coffee please? Okay.
